tasks.title: Create Vision Journal System
tasks.description: Build a system for capturing, storing, and reflecting on visual observations. Features: structured metadata storage, perception logging, pattern tracking, cross-session retrieval, optional mood/atmosphere tagging. Will support multimodal memory development.
notes: Completed: Vision Journal system successfully created and tested. Components: types.ts (comprehensive type definitions), journal.ts (persistent storage with JSONL format, querying, related entries, pattern analysis), journal.test.ts (15 passing tests), index.ts (API exports with VisionJournal.record() helper). System supports: multimodal observation capture,  perception lenses (analytical/aesthetic/narrative/critical/intuitive/comparative), pattern tracking across entries, self-revelation capturing, theme tagging, statistical analysis. Demonstrated working with the airbase image analysis - successfully recorded observation, linked themes, and generated report showing 3 entries with patterns like 'repetition' and 'symmetry' recurring.
